message: test(web): add integration tests for SEO and performance - Add sitemap validation tests (13 tests) - Validates XML structure, required pages, lastmod dates - Ensures admin/API routes are excluded - Verifies robots.txt references sitemap - Add bundle budget tests (9 tests) - Verifies size-limit configuration - Checks bundle analyzer setup - Runs size-limit and validates budget compliance - Add image optimization tests (5 tests) - Validates Next.js image config - Checks for raw usage vs next/image - Warns about excessively large images Closes jeffreysprompts.com-cu2y Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5
